cards.title: Create a parenting rota to reduce conflict
cards.body: A couple resolved constant bickering over household duties by establishing a simple parenting schedule. This system reduced stress and made responsibilities clear during the overwhelming early years with multiple children.

cards.title: Setting boundaries with difficult in-laws
cards.body: If your partner's parent shows cruelty, it's wise to limit their contact with your future children. Unless behavior changes significantly, protecting your kids should be the priority.

cards.title: Parental narcissism disrupts identity formation
cards.body: Narcissistic abuse from parents interrupts the normal process of developing your own identity and sense of self. Recovery involves reclaiming who you are beneath the damage.

cards.title: Virtual parents filling real parenting gaps
cards.body: Young people who lack parental validation are turning to online 'virtual parents' for emotional support and encouragement. This emerging trend highlights how some children seek affirmation they're missing at home.
